title: Sable Drive-By-Wire TFMG engine controller support
description: an unofficial fork of the fork drive by wire that adds support for the TFMG engine controller
body:
**This is not an official fork of the [drive-by-wire-sable](https://modrinth.com/mod/drive-by-wire-sable) mod. The original mod: [drive-by-wire](https://modrinth.com/mod/drive-by-wire).**

This fork adds support for the TFMG controller (engine_controller). You can configure the channel for any controller function (scroll up/down).

![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6363f9fc7e1df8fb23fbbe26822c39d52e9164a3.png)

INSTALL INSTEAD OF THE ORIGINAL, IT'S A FORK!
